Describe the bug
The "Submit" button on the login page is unresponsive when clicked, preventing the user from
logging in.
To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to the login page at https://example.com/login
2. Enter a valid username and password.
3. Click on the "Submit" button.
4. See error: The button doesn't respond, and the page doesn't load.
Expected behavior
The "Submit" button should trigger a login request and direct the user to the dashboard page.
Screenshots
(If applicable, provide any screenshot or link to an image showing the issue)
Desktop (please complete the following information):
 OS: Windows 10
 Browser: Chrome
 Version: 91.0.4472.124
Smartphone (please complete the following information)
 Device: iPhone 12
 OS: iOS 15.0
 Browser: Safari
 Version: 15.1
Additional context
The issue began occurring after the recent update to the login page on 02/27/2026. Users have
reported the same problem on different devices.
